title: finding add
description: Persist a durable finding/reflexion lesson. QUEST ISOLATION: scope is always 'quest' and quest_id is REQUIRED — findings are owned by exactly one quest; cross-quest/global findings are not allowed (invariant finding_quest_owned).

quest_id.description: owning quest; REQUIRED — no cross-quest/global findings

grounded_by.description: ref to the measurement/result the lesson is grounded in
